raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "assertive revelation of a supposed spiritual law linking inner vision to future self-realization",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a person's Vision and Ideal possess objective prophetic power over their eventual identity",
    "future becoming is predetermined or guaranteed by present inner imagery",
    "unveiling requires only time and fidelity to the ideal rather than external conditions or effort",
    "a non-physical correspondence exists between mental imagery and ontological outcome"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within an idealist or mental-causation ontology; relies on unstated premises of mind-over-matter manifestation without internal contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the listener accepts a metaphysics in which sustained ideals reliably shape external reality and the statement motivates disciplined alignment of thought and action",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "no such metaphysical causation exists, leading recipients to substitute visualization for practical effort or to interpret failure as insufficient fidelity to an ideal"
}
